title: Saudi Arabian Chicken and Castelvetrano Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic Saudi Arabian-inspired chicken dish served with a castelvetano olive pilaf.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add garlic and cook until fragrant.
Add chicken to the pan and cook until browned on both sides.
Add rice to the pan and stir to combine with chicken and garlic.
Add olives and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Add lemon juice and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish.
Serve hot and garnish with additional olives if desired.
Cook rice according to package instructions prior to assembly.
